title: Vibrant Roast Mediterranean Morcilla Grill
description: A flavorful and vibrant twist on traditional morcilla, featuring a mediterranean-inspired roast and a hint of chinese spices. Perfect for a quick and satisfying dinner.
instructions: Cut the bell peppers in half and remove the seeds and membranes.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, garlic, ginger, five-spice powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture on the bell peppers and place them on a baking sheet.
Roast the bell peppers in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they start to soften.
While the bell peppers are roasting, cook the morcilla in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Once the morcilla is cooked, add the crumbled feta cheese to the skillet and stir until melted and combined.
To assemble the dish, place a grilled portobello mushroom cap on a plate, top with a spoonful of the morcilla and feta mixture, and finish with a roasted bell pepper half.
